  <style>
    #Layer_2{
      animation: mymove 6s infinite;
      transform-origin: center;
    }
    #Layer_3{
      animation: zoomTree 6s infinite;
      transform-origin: center;
    }
    #Shadow{
      animation: fadeIn 6s infinite;
    }
    @keyframes mymove {
      0% { transform: scale(0.7); }
      40%, 100% { transform: scale(1.0); }
    }
    @keyframes zoomTree {
      0% { transform: scale(0.7);}
      40%, 100% { transform: scale(2.0) translateY(80px); }
    }
    @keyframes fadeIn {
      0% {opacity:0;}
      60%{opacity: 0}
      100% {opacity:1; transform: translateY(120px) translateX(10px);}
    }

  </style>

  <main id="main">

    <!-- ======= Blog Section ======= -->
    <section id="blog" class="blog">
      <div class="container">

        <div class="row">
          
          <!-- ======= Blog Section ======= -->
          

  <div class="col-lg-8 entries">

    <div id="post_template" class="row animate__animated animate__zoomIn">
      <!-- template schema, hidden from the dom -->
      <div id="article" style="visibility: hidden;" class="col-md-6 d-flex align-items-stretch" >
        
        <!-- blog entry -->
        <article class="entry animate__animated animate__zoomIn">
          <div class="entry-img">
            <a id="entry-img-link" href="">
              <img id="entry-img" src="" class="img-fluid">
            </a>
          </div>

          <h2 class="entry-title">
            <a id="entry_title_link" href=""></a>
          </h2>

          <div class="entry-meta">
            <ul>
              <li class="d-flex align-items-center">
                <i class="icofont-user"></i> 
                <a id="usrName" href=""></a>
              </li>
              <li class="d-flex align-items-center">
                <i class="icofont-wall-clock"></i> <a id="postDate" href=""></a>
              </li>
              <li class="d-flex align-items-center"><i class="icofont-eye-alt"></i> 
                <a id="postViews"></a>
              </li>
              <li class="d-flex align-items-center"><i class="icofont-comment"></i> 
                <a id="postComments"></a>
              </li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div class="entry-content">
            <p id="postDescription"></p>
            <p id="postTags"></p>
            <div class="read-more">
              <a id="readMoreBtn" href="">Read more</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
        <!-- End blog entry -->

      </div>
    </div>

    </div>

          <p>Cookies are small pieces of text, which are saved for a certain period of time on your computer or device through the web browser. You can delete cookies manually at any time from your browser. In <span style ='color: rgba (39, 196, 25, 0.795);'>TheWhiteCode.com </span> we use cookies to recognize whether a user is authorized or not and thus extend or invalidate the session on our platform In this way we guarantee, among other things, that only registered users can access public profiles. </p>
          <hr>

  <script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
      //*****************************
      // Mobile Navigation
      if ($('.nav-menu').length) {    
        var $mobile_nav = $('.nav-menu').clone().prop({
          class: 'mobile-nav d-lg-none'
        });
        $('body').append($mobile_nav);
        $('body').prepend('<button type="button" class="mobile-nav-toggle d-lg-none"><i class="icofont-navigation-menu"></i></button>');
        $('body').append('<div class="mobile-nav-overly"></div>');
        $('#header-container').css({'margin-top':'18px','padding-bottom':'15px'})

        $(document).on('click', '.mobile-nav-toggle', function(e) {
          $('body').toggleClass('mobile-nav-active');
          $('.mobile-nav-toggle i').toggleClass('icofont-navigation-menu icofont-close');
          $('.mobile-nav-overly').toggle();

          if ($('body').hasClass('mobile-nav-active')) {

            //$('#lastPosts').show();
            $('#lastPosts').show();
            if (!($('#lastPosts ul').has( "div" ).length)){
              requestLastPosts();
            }
            $('.admin_nav_btn').append('  Admin');
            $('.new_post_nav_btn').append('  Create Post');
            $( '.chat_nav_btn').append("  Chat");
            $( '.notify_nav_btn').append("  Mailbox");
            //$( '.notify_nav_btn').append("  Mailbox");
            $( '.account_nav_btn').append("  Account");
            //$( '.logout_nav_btn').append("Hello");
            $( '.logout_nav_btn').append("  Log out");
            
          }
          
        });

        function requestLastPosts(url){
          console.log("requesting")
          return $.ajax({
            url: url,
            method: 'GET',
            dataType: 'json',
            //contentType: "application/json; charset=utf-8",
          });
        }

        requestLastPosts('/post/get/last')
          .done( function(data){
            populateLastPostsList((data));
          })
          .fail(function(error){
            console.log(error.responseJSON);
            console.log(error);
          });            

        function populateLastPostsList(data){
          console.log("ok");
          //console.log(data[0].BlogLongTitle);
          var div = $('#lastPosts ul');
          //div.empty(); 
          data.forEach(function(item){
            var p = $('<div class="dropdown-item" clearfix animate__animated animate__bounceInRight" style="text-align: center;"> </div>');
            var t = $('<a></a>').attr('href', item.PostLink).append($('<h4></h4>').text(item.BlogLongTitle));
            p.append(t);
            var im = $('<a></a>').attr('href', item.PostLink).append($('<img alt="" style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; padding-left: 10%; padding-right: 10%; margin-top: 0";  align-items: center;>').attr('src',item.img));
            p.append(im);
            div.append(p);
          })
        }

        var path = window.location.pathname;
        if(path.includes("blog")){
          $('.mobile-nav').append('<div class="text-center" style="margin: 40px;"> <a href="https://leanpub.com/elmanualdelosalgoritmosylasestructurasdedatos"> <svg id="Layer_2" data-name="Layer 2"         $('#editorjs').css({'margin-left':'0px','margin-right':'0px'})

        $(document).on('click', '.mobile-nav .drop-down > a', function(e) {
          e.preventDefault();
          $(this).next().slideToggle(300);
          $(this).parent().toggleClass('active');
        
        });

        $(document).click(function(e) {
          var container = $(".mobile-nav, .mobile-nav-toggle");
          if (!container.is(e.target) && container.has(e.target).length === 0) {
            if ($('body').hasClass('mobile-nav-active')) {
              $('body').removeClass('mobile-nav-active');
              $('.mobile-nav-toggle i').toggleClass('icofont-navigation-menu icofont-close');
              $('.mobile-nav-overly').fadeOut();
            }

          }
          if(!$('body').hasClass('mobile-nav-active')){
            clearNavText();
          }

          $('.not_nav_btn').click(function(){
            if($('body').hasClass('mobile-nav-active')){
              $('.mobile-nav, .mobile-nav-toggle').click()
              clearNavText();
            }
          })

          $('.chat_nav_btn').click(function(){
            if($('body').hasClass('mobile-nav-active')){
              $('.mobile-nav, .mobile-nav-toggle').click()
              clearNavText();
            }
          })

          function clearNavText(){
            var cont = $('.new_post_nav_btn').html()
            if (cont){
              if(cont.indexOf('Create Post') != -1){
                $('.new_post_nav_btn').text('');
                $('.new_post_nav_btn').append('<i class="bx bx-pencil navicon"></i>');        
              }
            }
            
            var cont = $('.chat_nav_btn').html()
            if (cont){
              if(cont.indexOf("Chat") != -1){
                $('.chat_nav_btn').text(''); 
                $('.chat_nav_btn').append('<i class="not_nav_icon icofont-ui-chat navicon"></i>'); 
              }
            }
            
            var cont = $('.admin_nav_btn').html()
            if (cont){
              if(cont.indexOf('Admin') != -1){
                $('.admin_nav_btn').text(''); 
                $('.admin_nav_btn').append('<i class="bx bx-cog navicon"></i>'); 
              }
            }
            

            var cont = $('.notify_nav_btn').html()
            if (cont){
              if(cont.indexOf("Mailbox") != -1){
                $('.notify_nav_btn').text(''); 
                $('.notify_nav_btn').append('<i class="icofont-bell-alt navicon"></i>'); 
              }
            }
            
            var cont = $('.account_nav_btn').html()
            if (cont){
              if(cont.indexOf("Account") != -1){
                $('.account_nav_btn').text(''); 
                $('.account_nav_btn').append('<i class="icofont-user-alt-6 navicon"></i>'); 
              }
            }
            
            var cont = $('.logout_nav_btn').html()
            if (cont){
              if(cont.indexOf("Log out") != -1){
                $('.logout_nav_btn').text(''); 
                $('.logout_nav_btn').append('<i class="icofont-logout navicon"></i>'); 
              }
            }
          }
      
        
        });



      } else if ($(".mobile-nav, .mobile-nav-toggle").length) {
        $(".mobile-nav, .mobile-nav-toggle").hide();
      }

      //*****************************

      $('.drop-down').on('show.bs.dropdown', function() {
        $(this).find('.dropdown-menu').first().stop(true, true).slideDown();
      });

      $('.drop-down').on('hide.bs.dropdown', function() {
        $(this).find('.dropdown-menu').first().stop(true, true).slideUp();
      });
